title: taraxacum divarium
intro: Taraxacum divarium, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum divarium lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain taraxasterol, taraxeryl acetate, and other bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum divarium include its potential to support liver health, reduce blood pressure, and act as a diuretic, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues and skin problems. Taraxacum divarium is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a juice or added to food products, such as salad dressings and smoothies.
